resources.string: We\'ll need a few permissions to provide the best experience.
Welcome to IMS Constant Glucose Monitoring (CGM)! Discover amazing features and simplify your life with our intuitive tools. Get ready to explore!
To provide you with real-time updates and essential features even when the app is closed, we need background permission.

This app relies on **Bluetooth**, **Location** and **Microphone** permissions to function correctly. Without these, core features such as [mention specific features, e.g., \'device discovery\', \'nearby connections\', \'accurate tracking\', \'voice command\'] will not be available. Please grant them when prompted later.
